\tzpentry{ID4229}{Dark Magnetic Flux Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4229 introduces Dark Magnetic Flux Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Phi_{\text{dark}}(\chi_{\text{obs}}) = -G\sum_i \frac{M_i}{R_U\sin(|\chi_{\text{obs}} - \chi_i|)}$
\]
